final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multi-layer layout showcasing all UI components together — exact arrangement is yours
Subject: must include all UI components:
  - 网页 Dashboard (data panels, charts, nav)
  - 移动端界面 (mobile screen mockup)
  - 卡片 (card components)
  - 按钮 (button states)
  - 控件 (UI controls / toggles / sliders)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep tech-space backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-contrast, layered atmosphere with strong 科技感 — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction with vivid accent highlights — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek glass-morphism or frosted-panel surface treatment — exact sheen and depth are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve visual hierarchy across all component layers; all UI components listed above must be legible and distinct
Avoid: flat or dull presentation; cluttered illegible layout
